title: Sophie's Alloys
description: A mod designed to revamp how tool progression works in Minecraft, while also giving options to mix and match what materials you wish to use.
body:
Sophie's Alloys is designed to revamp how tool progression operates within vanilla Minecraft.  Bountiful amounts of new materials can be found within the Overworld, Nether, and even the End to craft your tools and armors, incentivising mixing and matching those materials to create better sets of equipment to aid on your adventures.  Perhaps one may wish to use Mithril Boots over Diamond Boots, but a Diamond Helmet over a Mithril one?

This mod also relies on Create and improves upon the automation and resource generation systems that Create provides.

I heavily recommend using a recipe viewer mod such as REI or JEI until I properly set up recipe advancements and the GitHub wiki.  This will help a lot with figuring out how to upgrade your tools.

### This mod is currently on development hiatus until I'm in a better living situation and once I'm finished with my other projects.
Current plans are once I can get back to having free time/time to work on this, this mod will be updating to 1.21 Fabric and NeoForge, as well as hopefully no longer having to rely on Create for recipe utilization.
